display_title: Slay the Spire 2:The Round Tea Party
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Round Tea Party.png}} {{E|The Round Tea Party|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in {{2|Glory}}. == Options == {{Frame|Enjoy Your Tea}} {{TS|positive||Obtain {{R|Royal Poison||2}} (relic).}} {{TS|positive||Heal to full HP.}}
{{Frame|Pick a Fight}} {{TS|negative||Lose 11 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random {{2|Relics|Relic}}.}} == Dialogue ==
You find an {{TS|orange||invitation}} for a {{TS|blue||"Sir Galalot"}} to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead. Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of {{TS|gold||commanders}}, {{TS|blue||generals}}, {{TS|red||warlords}}, and {{TS|blue||mercenaries}} having... tea? The gigantic knight donning a {{TS|gold||golden crown}} speaks. {{TS||shake|"Thou art late for Tea?!"}}
{{Frame|Enjoy Your Tea}}
You grab a teacup and down it one go. It's SCALDING HOT but you don't change your expression. The patrons are stunned by your lack of self preservation. "We meant no offense, Sir Galalot. our sincerest apologies." You enjoy some tea and crumpets, unaware of the poison you've ingested.
{{Frame|Pick a Fight}}
You jump onto the table and {{TS||shake|kick}} the {{TS|red||warlord knight}} in the face! The knight lets out a haunting shriek and keels over. {{TS|purple|shake|*everyone gasps*}}
{{Frame|Continue}}
The patrons stare wide-eyed at the corpse of one of their regulars... {{TS||shake|then bursts into applause!?}} "We were wondering how to rid of {{TS|red||Sir Wygore}}, incredible work!" They dump out your {{TS|green||poisoned tea}} and you discuss {{TS|orange||tactics}} and {{TS|purple||secrets}} all night. A most excellent tea party.
== Trivia == * From left to right, the knights in view appear to be [[The Champ]], a [[Crossbow Raider]], a [[Tracker Raider]], and a [[Brute Raider]]. [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
